author: RachiAM
body:
Happy birthday Burgo's blog :)  
Thanks for sharing… some of the best musical highlights indeed.

author: Spleeep
body:
Flummox – Yeah you're getting very 'linguistical' in your old age ;P

Happy Birthday BB!

author: captiano
body:
Happy Birthday Burgo's Blog!!!!!  
I always enjoys stopping by every now and then and getting your opinion and listening to some music I would have not even heard of if it wasn't for you.  
Loving your work!
